introduction-text:
Farmland Nutrient Management
"It ain't much, but it's honest work." - Dave Brandt

Farmland can be permanently upgraded in place via application of sufficient fertilizer and biochar, all the way from barren, through low, medium, and high, and finally to Terra Preta.

Step One:
Add any combination of fertilizers to add at least 150 N, 90 P, and 30 K.
compostbonemeal

Step Two:
Add two powdered charcoal to the fertilized farmland.
powder-charcoal

Step Three:
Wait! The farmland will now regenerate nutrients at the normal rate up to its new limits.

Note:
Any existing permaboosts will be cleared on upgrading, but can be reapplied later.
